metadata.title: Entanglement Entropy — The Ebit Curve

beats.narration_text: Sawadee. A learner asks: build me an interactive simulation of entanglement entropy. One Claude prompt. Here is what comes back.

props.command: build me an interactive sim of entanglement entropy

beats.narration_text: Entanglement Entropy is one of those ideas that is easier to see than to state. cos θ|00⟩ + sin θ|11⟩ — drag θ from product state to Bell state; watch the entropy curve and the subsystem Bloch ball shrink.. This simulation makes that visible — and every educator can build one.
Here is the prompt. One message to Claude.
beats.code_snippet: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Entanglement Entropy. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: Schmidt angle θ, Mode. Verify: cos θ|00⟩ + sin θ|11⟩ — drag θ from product state to Bell state; watch the entropy curve and the subsystem Bloch ball sh. Palette: background #FFFFFF, ink #2A1A0E, accent #C8102E.

props.command: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Entanglement Entropy. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: Schmidt angle θ, Mode. Verify: cos θ|00⟩ + sin θ|1

beats.narration_text: Claude returns a single-file HTML. Here is the heart of it — the integrator and the slider handler. No server. No build step. One file, everything in the browser.
beats.new_visual_element: Onda code-block: core JS (integrator + slider handler)
beats.prompt: Show the core physics loop from vol4-entanglement-entropy-slider.html

beats.narration_text: At the default settings: entanglement entropy. Watch what the simulation shows.
Now drag Schmidt angle θ from 0 to 45. Watch the physics respond in real time.
beats.new_visual_element: Slate: narrate slider sweep of Schmidt angle θ from 0 to 45

beats.narration_text: cos θ|00⟩ + sin θ|11⟩ — drag θ from product state to Bell state; watch the entropy curve and the subsystem Bloch ball shrink.. Exactly as the equations predict.
One prompt. A live demonstration of entanglement entropy. For educators: every concept in your course can have one of these. Claude builds it; you judge it; your students explore it.
Open this file in your browser and drag the controls. Or ask Claude to add a second parameter, change the palette, or explain the physics step by step alongside the simulation.
Take this prompt, run it on your own topic. Your turn.
beats.code_snippet: Take this Entanglement Entropy simulation and add a second slider that controls Schmidt angle θ. Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.

props.command: Take this Entanglement Entropy simulation and add a second slider that controls Schmidt angle θ. Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.

beats.narration_text: Entanglement Entropy — The Ebit Curve. Medhavy.
beats.new_visual_element: Outro: Entanglement Entropy — The Ebit Curve · @Medhavy
